[169:06]One other misconception I want to address

[169:10]People talk about the iron dome system

[169:20]Israel has a few missile defense systems. They have the iron dome. They have the David sling.

[169:33]system by the United States. Iron dome, which is the most famous one is just for short range rockets.

[170:01]What they're using for the ballistic missiles is the David slaying in the Aero system.

[170:06]But the problem is that ballistic missiles are much more difficult to intercept than

[170:11]drones and rockets.

[170:14]Ballistic missiles are faster. They're bigger. They go higher up in the air. And when they reach their terminal phase, they're basically unstoppable.

[170:23]So this is why Iran is launching hundreds of ballistic missiles and they're penetrating the shield.
